title: cephalocereus chrysacanthus
intro: Cephalocereus chrysacanthus, also known as the Golden Pincushion Cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Cephalocereus, native to Mexico. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cephalocereus chrysacanthus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or poultices, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
